notes: Full food menu captured from Tutta Bella Downtown Seattle (1100 Virginia St); seasonal features noted. No beverage/cocktail/wine pricing was present in the raw text — beverage list skipped. Minestrone soup shows two prices ($7/$10), likely cup/bowl sizing.

dishes.name: Garlic Knots
dishes.description: Neapolitan pizza dough knots, garlic butter, parsley, grana padano, served with house marinara

dishes.name: Bruschetta
dishes.description: Tomato, basil, garlic. With toasted house-made bread

dishes.name: Wild Mushroom & Herbed Ricotta Bruschetta
dishes.description: Wild mushrooms sautéed in butter and Calabrian chili, balsamic, lemon zest, and chives. With toasted house-made bread

dishes.name: Caponata Bruschetta
dishes.description: Slow-cooked eggplant, tomato compote with sweet-and-sour notes, finished with olives, capers, pine nuts. With toasted house-made bread

dishes.name: Roasted Cauliflower
dishes.description: Roasted cauliflower, lemon caper drizzle, crispy prosciutto, bread crumbs, Pecorino Romano
